name: FISERV INC
summary: Fiserv, Inc. is a leading global provider of payments and financial services technology solutions, serving merchants, banks, credit unions, financial institutions, and corporate clients. Key offerings include account processing, digital banking, card issuer processing, network services, e-commerce, merchant acquiring, and the Clover cloud-based POS and business management platform. In 2025, Fiserv reported $21.2 billion in total revenue, with 80% derived from processing and services fees under multi-year contracts.

products.name: Clover
products.description: Cloud-based POS and business management platform for small businesses, including hardware, SaaS, and value-added services.

products.name: Commerce Hub
products.description: Payment gateway and merchant orchestration layer providing e-commerce, omnichannel, and multi-acquirer solutions.

products.name: Clover Capital
products.description: Working capital advance program providing small business owners access to funds.

products.name: Finxact
products.description: Cloud-native, open-platform core banking solution for financial institutions.

products.name: NOW Gateway
products.description: Real-time payment gateway supporting RTP and FedNow networks for financial institutions.

products.name: Zelle
products.description: Person-to-person digital payment network integrated into Fiserv's digital payment offerings.

products.name: SpendLabs
products.description: Digital spend management platform for financial institutions and corporate clients.

products.name: Card Services
products.description: Credit, debit, and prepaid card processing and production services for financial institutions.

products.name: AllData
products.description: Financial data aggregation service providing account and transaction data to financial institutions and fintechs.

products.name: Stored Value Solutions
products.description: Gift card, loyalty, prepaid card, and digital wallet program management for enterprise clients.

partnerships.description: ISVs embed Clover payment capabilities and hardware into their platforms to monetize transactions.
ISOs act as third-party resellers distributing Fiserv's merchant processing products and services.
Joint venture alliances combine Fiserv's technology and processing with partners' distribution and customer relationships.
Agent sales forces distribute Merchant segment products and services on behalf of Fiserv.
